```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-size:0.78em;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.85em;line-height:1.4;">
  Even with perfect info, things <span style="color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">drift</span> over a long chain.
 </div>

 <div style="position:relative;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.2em 1.4em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 600 130" style="width:100%;height:auto;" preserveAspectRatio="none">
   <line x1="20" y1="120" x2="580" y2="120" stroke="#E0DBE5" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/>
   <path d="M 20,90 Q 100,90 150,80 Q 200,70 250,72 Q 300,75 350,68 Q 400,60 450,55 Q 500,50 580,40" stroke="#9B8EA0" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3 3" opacity="0.4"/>
   <path d="M 20,90 Q 100,88 150,82 Q 200,75 250,80 Q 300,85 350,75 Q 400,65 450,60 Q 500,80 580,115" stroke="#D45F47" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none"/>
   <circle cx="20" cy="90" r="5" fill="#5654A2"/>
   <circle cx="180" cy="78" r="5" fill="#C4881A"/>
   <circle cx="380" cy="70" r="5" fill="#C4881A"/>
   <circle cx="580" cy="115" r="7" fill="#D45F47"/>
  </svg>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;margin-top:0.4em;">
   <div style="color:#5654A2;text-align:left;max-width:7em;">plan good,<br>execution OK</div>
   <div style="color:#C4881A;text-align:center;max-width:7em;">tool returns<br>misread</div>
   <div style="color:#C4881A;text-align:center;max-width:7em;">one wrong step<br>→ chain wrong</div>
   <div style="color:#D45F47;text-align:right;max-width:7em;font-weight:700;">state fully drifts<br>output 99% wrong</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  the longer the chain, the cheaper the early intervention.
 </div>

</div>
```
